evals.prompt: Create a pointing budget for a telescope satellite requiring 0.1 arcsec stability. Assume knowledge error of 0.05 arcsec and control jitter of 0.07 arcsec. Calculate the RSS total.
evals.expected_output: A markdown table showing the error sources and an RSS total of ~0.086 arcsec, confirming it meets the 0.1 arcsec requirement.
